context: Tests whether the agent produces a correctly formatted entity model document from a requirements file, using the prescribed Mermaid diagram style (entities and relationships only, no attributes), the correct per-entity structure (### heading, one-sentence description, 5-column table), the allowed AIUP data types, and the exact validation rule vocabulary from REFERENCE.md.

checklist.name: Output path
checklist.description: The entity model is written to docs/entity_model.md (not any other path)

checklist.name: Mermaid block present
checklist.description: The document contains an erDiagram fenced code block (```mermaid ... erDiagram ...```)

checklist.name: No attributes in diagram
checklist.description: The Mermaid erDiagram block contains NO attribute lines inside any entity block — entity blocks are empty or absent (show only entity names)

checklist.name: Correct relationship syntax
checklist.description: All relationships in the Mermaid block use the exact syntax ENTITY_A ||--o{ ENTITY_B : "relationship" (pipe-pipe-dash-dash-o-brace form)

checklist.name: Entity ### headings uppercase
checklist.description: Every entity section starts with a ### heading whose name is in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (e.g., ### GUEST, ### ROOM_TYPE)

checklist.name: One-sentence description per entity
checklist.description: Each entity section has exactly one sentence of description between the ### heading and the attribute table — no multi-sentence paragraphs or prose blocks

checklist.name: 5-column attribute table
checklist.description: Every entity's attribute table has exactly 5 columns: Attribute, Description, Data Type, Length/Precision, Validation Rules

checklist.name: AIUP data types only
checklist.description: The Data Type column contains only values from: Long, String, Integer, Decimal, Boolean, Date, DateTime — no SQL types such as VARCHAR, bigint, TEXT, NUMERIC, or TIMESTAMP

checklist.name: Valid validation rules
checklist.description: Every cell in the Validation Rules column uses only the allowed vocabulary: Primary Key, Sequence; Not Null; Not Null, Unique; Not Null, Foreign Key (TABLE.id); Optional; Not Null, Min: X, Max: Y; Not Null, Values: A, B, C; Not Null, Format: Email

checklist.name: No empty validation rules
checklist.description: No cell in the Validation Rules column is empty or contains a placeholder such as '-' or 'N/A'

checklist.name: Multi-column constraint note
checklist.description: The RESERVATION entity (or equivalent) includes a Constraints line after its attribute table noting that check-out date must be after check-in date

checklist.name: No prose or Relationships table
checklist.description: The document does NOT contain any prose description block like 'Key attributes: ...' and does NOT contain a separate 'Relationships' table section
